trails.name: Val di Funes Meadow Trail
trails.description: Experience one of the most iconic views in all of the Alps on this gentle valley walk. The trail offers the classic postcard perspective of the St. Johann church with the dramatic Odle/Geisler peaks rising behind it. This enchanting valley showcases the perfect harmony between human settlement and nature, with traditional Tyrolean farms scattered across rolling meadows against a backdrop of soaring limestone spires. The trail is especially magical in spring with blooming wildflowers, in autumn with golden foliage, and in early morning when mist clings to the valley floor. This easy walk captures the essence of alpine beauty and is suitable for all ages and fitness levels.

pois.name: St. Johann Church
pois.description: Famous alpine church with Odle backdrop

josephineNote.en: Come in early morning before the tour buses arrive — the church against the Odle peaks in the mist is one of the most beautiful things I know in South Tyrol.
josephineNote.it: Vieni di mattina presto, prima che arrivino i pullman — la chiesa con le Odle nella nebbia è una delle cose più belle che conosco in Alto Adige.
josephineNote.de: Komm früh morgens, bevor die Reisebusse kommen — die Kirche vor den Geislerspitzen im Morgennebel ist eines der schönsten Bilder, die ich in Südtirol kenne.

trails.description: A spectacular mountain ascent from Dorf Tirol to the historic Muthöfe farms, following the ancient Trail 23 (Muter Weg). This classic South Tyrolean hike climbs through mixed forests and alpine meadows, passing traditional mountain farms that have stood for over 800 years on the steep southern slopes of Mutspitze. The trail offers constantly improving panoramic views over Merano, the Adige Valley, and the surrounding peaks. At the summit station, enjoy refreshments at Gasthaus Hochmuth while taking in breathtaking 360-degree vistas. The route combines cultural heritage with natural beauty, showcasing the traditional alpine farming lifestyle against a backdrop of dramatic mountain scenery. Starting right from Dorf Tirol, this trail is perfect for GPS tracking testing with its real-world coordinates, measurable elevation gain, and multiple checkpoint POIs along the route.
trails.name: Hochmuth Trail (Muthöfe Route)

pois.description: Starting point with parking and cable car access
pois.name: Hochmuth Cable Car Valley Station

pois.description: Traditional mountain inn at 1,406m with local cuisine
pois.name: Gasthaus Steinegg

pois.description: Summit viewpoint with panoramic views over Merano and Adige Valley
pois.name: Hochmuth Mountain Station

trails.tagline: Venture into the heart of the mountains

josephineNote.en: The Muthöfe farms at the top still serve homemade Speck and Käsknödel — sit on the bench, eat slowly, and look at the view. That is the whole point.
josephineNote.it: Le malghe Muthöfe in cima servono ancora speck e Käsknödel fatti in casa — siediti sulla panca, mangia lentamente e guarda il panorama. È questo il punto.
josephineNote.de: Die Muthöfe oben servieren noch selbstgemachten Speck und Käsknödel — setz dich auf die Bank, iss langsam und schau auf die Aussicht. Das ist der ganze Zweck.

josephineNote.en: This one rewards patience — the lake at the top is that deep, impossible blue that only high-altitude meltwater gives you. Worth every step.
josephineNote.it: Questo sentiero ricompensa la pazienza — il lago in cima è di quel blu profondo e impossibile che solo l'acqua di fusione d'alta quota può darti. Vale ogni passo.
josephineNote.de: Dieser Weg belohnt Geduld — der See oben leuchtet in dem tiefen, unwirklichen Blau, das nur Hochgebirgsschmelzwasser so haben kann. Jeden Schritt wert.

josephineNote.en: Schenna sits just above Merano — this loop through vineyards and orchards gives you the full South Tyrolean picture: vines, castles, and mountains all at once.
josephineNote.it: Scena è proprio sopra Merano — questo anello tra vigneti e frutteti ti dà l'immagine completa dell'Alto Adige: viti, castelli e montagne tutto insieme.
josephineNote.de: Schenna liegt direkt über Meran — dieser Rundweg durch Weinberge und Obstgärten zeigt dir das volle Südtiroler Bild: Reben, Burgen und Berge auf einmal.

checkpoints.name: Tiroler Kreuz
checkpoints.description: Good restaurant to enjoy an espresso.

josephineNote.en: Dorf Tirol is the kind of village that makes you understand why people have been coming here for centuries. The waterfall at the end is a proper reward.
josephineNote.it: Dorf Tirol è il tipo di paese che ti fa capire perché la gente viene qui da secoli. La cascata alla fine è una vera ricompensa.
josephineNote.de: Dorf Tirol ist das Dorf, das dir erklärt, warum die Menschen seit Jahrhunderten hierher kommen. Der Wasserfall am Ende ist eine echte Belohnung.

josephineNote.en: The Mastaun Alm is the kind of place you want to not tell anyone about — quiet, genuine, with fresh cheese and a view that goes on forever.
josephineNote.it: La malga Mastaun è il tipo di posto che vorresti non dire a nessuno — tranquilla, genuina, con formaggio fresco e un panorama che non finisce mai.
josephineNote.de: Die Mastaun Alm ist der Ort, den du für dich behalten möchtest — ruhig, echt, mit frischem Käse und einer Aussicht, die nie endet.
